content: Maker, confirmed git status shows exactly the 6 memory-bank deletions plus the brief-session.md modification as this cycle's changes -- verified via git status --short, not assumed.
Maker, verified brief-session.md diff: Round Table section (steps 1-3) untouched, only 'Memory Bank Convention' section and frontmatter description line changed. No unrelated drift.

Maker, noted two unrelated pre-existing working-tree items not part of this cycle: 'D repo-dump.txt' (tracked, already deleted before this cycle started) and untracked 'repo-dump-fresh.txt'. Neither will be staged in this cycle's commit -- out of scope, flagging for the human to handle separately.
